title: On-device inference
description: Run LLMs fully offline using native llama.cpp bindings compiled for each platform. No network required, no data leakage.

title: Kotlin Multiplatform API
description: A single, shared Kotlin API for Android, iOS, desktop, and server — with expect/actual handled for you.

title: Remote inference
description: Use HTTP-based inference when models are too large or when centralized execution is required — without changing your app logic.

title: Text generation & embeddings
description: Built-in support for common LLM use cases like text generation, chat-style prompts, and vector embeddings.

title: GGUF model support
description: Works with modern GGUF-based models such as LLaMA, Mistral, and Phi.

title: Lightweight runtime
description: No heavy frameworks, no cloud SDKs. Just Kotlin, native binaries, and full control over your stack.
